prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model assuming annual volatility of ~25% for CI (Cigna). The 20-day forecast incorporates expected slight upward drift consistent with long-term equity returns (~6% annually) while accounting for uncertainty that increases with longer time horizons. The confidence intervals reflect standard deviations scaled to the 20-day period.
